name: whiteboard.createRoom
description: Create a new whiteboard room for collaborative brainstorming. Returns a room ID that can be shared with participants.

session_id.description: Optional brainstorm session ID to link this whiteboard to (optional, uses session)

project_id.description: Project ID for scoping (optional, uses session)

org_id.description: Organization ID for multi-tenant context (optional, uses session)

metadata.description: Optional key-value metadata to attach to the room
